name: @uptimizr/unity
description: Unity (WebGL export) connector for Uptimizr — JS-only pointer/perf capture plus a bridged camera-pose / world-space tier via a thin engine-side shim.
author: Raanan Weber (https://github.com/RaananW)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run bundle:global
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/unity standalone bundle — Apache-2.0. Async-import into a Unity WebGL export's host page. */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-unity.js
scripts.bundle:global: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=UptimizrUnity --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/unity standalone bundle (global) — Apache-2.0. Inject via a <script> tag into a Unity WebGL export host page; exposes window.UptimizrUnity. */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-unity.global.js
